draft_v1: {"schema_v":1,"recipe":{"title":"15-MINUTE PANTRY TOMATO SOUP","description":"NOTE : I like to use high-quality canned tomatoes such as Muir Glen in this soup.","yield_phrase":"4"},"steps":[{"instruction":"","ingredient_lines":[{"raw_ingredient_text":"3 tablespoons unsalted butter"},{"raw_ingredient_text":"1 large onion, finely diced (about 1 1/2 cups)"},{"raw_ingredient_text":"Pinch of red pepper flakes"},{"raw_ingredient_text":"1/2 teaspoon dried oregano"},{"raw_ingredient_text":"1 tablespoon all-purpose flour"},{"raw_ingredient_text":"Two 28-ounce cans whole tomatoes (see Note above), with their juice"},{"raw_ingredient_text":"1/2 cup whole milk or heavy cream"},{"raw_ingredient_text":"Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper"},{"raw_ingredient_text":"2 tablespoons whiskey, vodka, or brandy (optional)"},{"raw_ingredient_text":"2 tablespoons extra-virgin olive oil"},{"raw_ingredient_text":"2 tablespoons chopped fresh herbs, such as parsley, basil, or chives (optional)"}]}]}
